title: abutilon inclusum
intro: Abutilon inclusum, also known as the desert holly or Mexican thistle, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon inclusum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Abutilon inclusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
